ddls:
CREATE TABLE "enemies" (
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enemy */,
  "enemy_name" TEXT /* Name of the enemy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the enemy */,
  "health_points" INTEGER /* Health points of the enemy */,
  "attack_power" INTEGER /* Attack power of the enemy */,
  "defense_power" INTEGER /* Defense power of the enemy */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points awarded for defeating the enemy */,
  "gold_drop" INTEGER /* Gold dropped by the enemy */,
  "enemy_type" TEXT /* Type of the enemy (e.g., boss, normal, elite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemy_vulnerabilities" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the element */,
  "damage_multiplier" REAL /* Multiplier for damage of the specified element */,
  "resistance_type" TEXT /* Type of resistance (e.g., weak, strong, immune) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enemy_vulnerabilities_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enemy_vulnerabilities_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element */,
  "element_name" TEXT /* Name of the element */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapons" (
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon */,
  "weapon_name" TEXT /* Name of the weapon */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weapon */,
  "attack_power" INTEGER /* Attack power of the weapon */,
  "critical_chance" REAL /* Critical hit chance of the weapon */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary element of the weapon */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the weapon (e.g., common, uncommon, rare) */,
  "level_requirement" INTEGER /* Level requirement to equip the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapons_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weapon_elements" (
  "weapon_element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weapon element */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "element_id" INTEGER /* ID of the additional element */,
  "damage_bonus" INTEGER /* Bonus damage for the additional element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weapon_element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_elements_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weapon_elements_element_id FOREIGN KEY ("element_id") REFERENCES elements ("element_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the player */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the player last logged in */,
  "experience_points" INTEGER /* Experience points of the player */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Gold owned by the player */,
  "game_level" INTEGER /* Game level of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_weapons" (
  "player_weapon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-weapon relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "weapon_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weapon */,
  "acquired_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player acquired the weapon */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player last used the weapon */,
  "upgrade_level" INTEGER /* Upgrade level of the weapon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_weapon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_weapons_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_weapons_weapon_id FOREIGN KEY ("weapon_id") REFERENCES weapons ("weapon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_enemies" (
  "player_enemy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-enemy relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy */,
  "defeated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the enemy was defeated */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Total damage dealt by the player to the enemy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_enemy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_enemies_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_enemies_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points awarded for completing the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "player_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-achievement relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the achievement was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_preferences" (
  "player_preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player preference */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_preferences_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemy_drops" (
  "enemy_drop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enemy drop */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dropped item */,
  "drop_chance" REAL /* Chance of the item being dropped */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enemy_drop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enemy_drops_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enemy_drops_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., potion, equipment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_items" (
  "player_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-item relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "acquired_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player acquired the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item owned by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_items_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bosses" (
  "boss_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boss */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy */,
  "boss_name" TEXT /* Name of the boss */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the boss */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bosses_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boss_battles" (
  "boss_battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each boss battle */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "boss_id" INTEGER /* ID of the boss */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the battle */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the battle (e.g., win, loss) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("boss_battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boss_battles_boss_id FOREIGN KEY ("boss_id") REFERENCES bosses ("boss_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boss_battles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_modes" (
  "player_game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game mode relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "last_played_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player last played the game mode */,
  "high_score" INTEGER /* High score achieved by the player in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_modes_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_modes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
